overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through Night City's neon-lit streets at night, entering a freight elevator to descend into a lower district, and emerging into a crowded entertainment area with heavy neon signage and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet city street past towering neon billboards and reflective skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the street in the distance

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' with food imagery
tall futuristic buildings covered in neon signage and glass facades
black metal railings separating the pedestrian walkway from the road
rain-soaked street surface reflecting the colorful neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a wide, wet city street in a futuristic metropolis at night. Towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements like 'EL GUAPO' dominate the skyline, while the reflective asphalt mirrors the vibrant lights. Sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves through the scene as the player approaches a freight elevator entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial freight elevator descending between city levels

events.description: freight elevator door opens and player enters the cargo lift
environment becomes significantly darker as the elevator descends into the lower levels

agents.ego_description: entering the industrial freight elevator and descending to a lower city level

entered.detail: large metal roll-up gate with mesh pattern that opens to reveal the elevator shaft
illuminated control panel with up/down arrows and floor indicators
rusted metal mesh walls enclosing the cargo elevator platform

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and enters a large industrial freight elevator. The metal gate opens to reveal a dark, enclosed shaft with grated metal walls. As the elevator descends, the lighting drops to near darkness, with only the control panel's green indicators visible. The segment ends as the elevator reaches the bottom and the gate opens to a dark alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit service alley with industrial steam vents

events.description: exits the freight elevator into a dark narrow alleyway
yellow and green neon MARK sign becomes visible illuminating the alley ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow back alley toward the neon-lit entertainment district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera through the foggy alley

entered.detail: large rectangular yellow billboard with 'MARK' text and green X symbol
tall weathered concrete walls with graffiti and industrial piping
chain-link fence with green indicator lights running along the alley

segments.scene_description: Exiting the elevator, the player enters a narrow, dimly lit service alley with steam rising from vents and graffiti-covered concrete walls. The environment is darker and more enclosed than the street above. As the player progresses, a bright yellow 'MARK' neon sign becomes visible through the fog, signaling the approach to a more populated area.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded entertainment district with clubs and holographic displays

events.description: emerges from the dark alley into the vibrant neon-lit entertainment area with the WET DREAM club
crowd density increases significantly with many pedestrians filling the walkway

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded entertainment district past club entrances and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the club entrance, some standing and others walking

entered.detail: large pink and purple neon sign displaying 'WET DREAM' above a club entrance
illuminated entrance with holographic mannequins displayed in windows
overhead metal structure with hanging lights covering the pedestrian area
large illuminated window showing rotating holographic figures

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the alley into a bustling entertainment district bathed in vibrant neon light. The 'WET DREAM' club sign dominates the view in pink and purple hues, while crowds of pedestrians fill the covered walkway. Holographic displays and reflective wet pavement create a dense, atmospheric cyberpunk environment as the player moves through the crowd.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit metropolis down into a claustrophobic industrial underbelly that eventually opens into a dense entertainment district. It begins on a wet city street dominated by towering skyscrapers and reflective asphalt before the camera approaches and enters a large industrial freight elevator. As the elevator descends into a dark, enclosed shaft, the vibrant city lights vanish, replaced by the dim green glow of a control panel until the gate opens into a narrow, steam-filled service alley. The scene then shifts through graffiti-covered concrete walls and thick fog, guided by a distant yellow neon sign that signals the exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a bustling district bathed in pink and purple hues, moving through crowds of pedestrians beneath the massive holographic displays of the Wet Dream club.
